findings.problem: The narration repeatedly slips into clipped, subject-thinned fragments ("Same paragraph break." / "Sheet lifted, turned, lowered." / "A repeated mark like a hooked gate."), which violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping and makes the prose feel authorially shorthand rather than fully embodied close third.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:417 into grammatically complete sentences with explicit subjects and finite verbs. Keep Owen's compressed noticing and tempo, but move the pressure into full clauses or action-bearing syntax instead of noun-phrase fragments.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:417 all read as complete sentences with explicit subjects and verbs while preserving Owen's focalized urgency; fail if any of those locations still relies on clipped narration that omits required function words for emphasis.

findings.problem: The chapter leans repeatedly on the same corrective-negation sentence shape ("Not a passing one." / "Not because..." / "Not the whole thing." / "Not dramatic." / "Not just one page?"), and by the second scene it reads as a visible prose tic rather than fresh emphasis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence scaffolding at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:291, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:437, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:453. Keep Owen and Prue's habit of narrowing or correcting claims, but let several of these beats land through direct statement, action, or subordinate-clause revision instead of another standalone "Not..." pivot.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of the cited passages reduce the standalone "Not..." correction move to no more than one instance per scene and recast at least three of the cited beats into distinct sentence shapes that carry the same correction without opening on "Not"; fail if both scenes still stack multiple standalone negation pivots in close succession.

summary: Boundary beats land cleanly, Owen and Prue remain distinct and style-bible-consistent, the winter-sky reveal is earned rather than convenient, and I see no continuity or sanitization failures. The chapter still misses award/prose pass because recurrent clipped narration and repeated "Not..." correction pivots advertise sentence-level formula where the rest of the chapter is otherwise controlled and alive.
